title: citrus × pumila
intro: Citrus × pumila, also known as the Satsuma Mandarin, is a dwarf citrus plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is a hybrid of the mandarin orange. The medicinal properties of Citrus × pumila include its high content of flavonoids and limonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of consuming Citrus × pumila include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Citrus × pumila can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, juices, and extracts, which are often used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems.
